rulings.Case Title: DOLORES STREET COMMUNITY SERVICES, INC., VS. MARTY'S PLACE AFFORDABLE HOUSING CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 5, 2025 line 1. DEFENDANT MARTY'S PLACE AFFORDABLE HOUSING CORPORATION* MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is DENIED. The Court cannot use extrinsic evidence to interpret the lease and incorporated documents. Defendant does not cite authority that the Court can consider Plaintiff's statements about standing to test the sufficiency of a pleading. Thus, standing is sufficiently plead because the lease and incorporated documents attached in the Complaint provide ambiguity regarding the parties' rights under the lease. =(501/DWH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: 1188 MISSION ST LP VS. MITCHELL AHRENS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleading To Complaint For Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 5, 2025 line 6. DEFENDANT MITCHELL AHRENS Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleading To Complaint For Unlawful Detainer is DENIED. The complaint states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Uncertainty is not grounds for judgment on the pleadings. (CCP 438.) =(501/DWH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
